title: Glide the Globe
description: a mod that expands on minecraft 1.21.6
body:
**_Do you think the 1.21.6 Chase the Skies update didn't add enough, Well this mod is for you!

In this mod we plan to expand on Minecraft 1.21.6 with features players wanted as well as features that just fit the update
 
The First update comes with decorative dried ghast blocks, a way to make ghastlings not age & more1_**

Wanna Know everything added:
